levers.name: Reactivation Email 01 — TReO PSAP + Clearance Tease
levers.subject_line: We have been thinking about you
levers.preview_text: Affordable hearing health, no prescription, no appointment. Shop TReO.
levers.offer: TReO PSAP — shop now. Light tease of upcoming clearance event.

gates.stripe_gate: Matt must connect Stripe to collect payment

can_spam.physical_address: PLACEHOLDER — Matt must insert real address before send

compliance.sms_tcpa: NOT used in this campaign. SMS waits on consent pass.
compliance.medical_claims: None. TReO positioned as PSAP only. No hearing-aid, hearing-loss, or FDA-cleared language.
compliance.securities_firewall: No INND, stock, or raise language.

placeholders_to_resolve_before_send: PHYSICAL MAILING ADDRESS PLACEHOLDER — insert real OTCHealth Inc. street address
{{SHOP_NOW_URL}} — insert Shopify TReO product page URL
Confirm {{unsubscribe_url}} and {{preferences_url}} are active Customer.io liquid tags
levers.measurement: Open rate -> click rate -> order -> $ (Customer.io -> Shopify)
